prepare-pr.description: Prepare a pull request summary using the repository template.
prepare-pr.template: Read `docs/pull_request_template.md`, inspect current git diff and recent commits, then draft a PR body. Include related issue references, validation run, and any not-run checks with reasons. Do not create or push unless explicitly asked.

commit-message.description: Draft a Conventional Commit message for the current staged or unstaged diff.
commit-message.template: Inspect the current staged diff first, then unstaged diff if nothing is staged. Draft one Conventional Commit message using the repository rules in `CONTRIBUTING.md`. Keep the header <= 100 characters. Do not commit unless explicitly asked.

command: root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; dotnet format ViajantesTurismo.slnx --include "$rel" --no-restore
root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; bash scripts/lint-markdown.sh --fix "$rel"

root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then shfmt -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$rel"; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --env HOME=/tmp --volume "$root:/workspace" --workdir /workspace mvdan/shfmt:v3.11.0 -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$rel"; else echo "Optional: shfmt requires local install or docker. Skipping shell autofix." >&2; fi

root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/format-powershell-file.ps1 -Path "$rel"; else echo "Optional: pwsh is required for PowerShell autofix. Skipping PowerShell formatting." >&2; fi
